title: brachypodium sylvaticum var. kelungense
intro: Brachypodium sylvaticum var. kelungense, also known as Taiwan bristle-grass, is a variety of the Brachypodium sylvaticum plant species, typically found in mountainous regions of Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Brachypodium sylvaticum var. kelungense include infusions and decoctions, which can be prepared by boiling the plant's roots or leaves in water.
